title: Psychrogeton capusii
taxonomy: Psychrogeton capusii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It belongs to the genus Psychrogeton, which is a group of plants native to the Mediterranean region. Psychrogeton capusii is further classified as a member of the order Apiales, which comprises plants with umbrella-like inflorescences and small, often fragrant flowers. At the kingdom level, Psychrogeton capusii is classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae, which includes all plants. The full classification of Psychrogeton capusii is: Kingdom: Plantae, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Apiales, Family: Apiaceae, and Genus: Psychrogeton.
